basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 at nitw.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NIT Warangal JRF Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with B.E./ B.Tech., M.E./ M.Tech., or M.Sc. qualifications in relevant Metallurgical, Materials, Mechanical Engineering, or Nanoscience disciplines and a maximum age limit of 30 years can apply via email on or before 21 July 2026. The official notification PDF and email application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 33 years for OBC-NCL, 35 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. in Metallurgical & Materials/Mechanical Engineering + M.Tech./M.E. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, M.Sc. in Materials Science/Nanoscience and Nanotechnology + M.Tech. in relevant field
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. in Metallurgical & Materials Engineering/Mechanical Engineering and M.Tech./M.E. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering (or equivalent) with 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA (GEN/OBC-NCL/GEN-EWS) or 55% or 6.0 CGPA (SC/ST/PwD); OR B.Tech./B.E. with 7.5/10 CGPA or 70% (GEN etc.) or 7.0/10 or 65% (SC/ST/PwD); OR M.Sc. in Materials Science/Nanoscience with M.Tech. in relevant field with same percentage/CGPA requirements. GATE not mandatory.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- pm for the first 2 years and Rs. 42,000/- pm for the third year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.national_institute_of_technology_waranga: B.Tech./B.E. in Metallurgical & Materials/Mechanical Engineering + M.Tech./M.E. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, M.Sc. in Materials Science/Nanoscience and Nanotechnology + M.Tech. in relevant field

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.Tech./B.E. in Metallurgical & Materials Engineering/Mechanical Engineering and M.Tech./M.E. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering (or equivalent) with 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA (GEN/OBC-NCL/GEN-EWS) or 55% or 6.0 CGPA (SC/ST/PwD); OR B.Tech./B.E. with 7.5/10 CGPA or 70% (GEN etc.) or 7.0/10 or 65% (SC/ST/PwD); OR M.Sc. in Materials Science/Nanoscience with M.Tech. in relevant field with same percentage/CGPA requirements. GATE not mandatory.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 33 years for OBC-NCL, 35 years for SC/ST/PwD/Female candidates

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- pm for the first 2 years and Rs. 42,000/- pm for the third year

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Warangal is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./B.E. in Metallurgical & Materials Engineering/Mechanical Engineering and M.Tech./M.E. in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, or an M.Sc. in Materials Science/Nanoscience with an M.Tech. in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 30 years, with age relaxations available for OBC-NCL, SC, ST, PwD, and female candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow position is Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JRF recruitment at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply by sending their application via email, ensuring all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an interview, which can be conducted online or offline, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Does the JRF position require a GATE score?
faq.answer: No, a GATE score is not mandatory for applying to the Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Warangal located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Warangal is located in Warangal, Telangana, with the pincode 506004.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is MMED/BS/ECRG-RS36031/JRF/.
